sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n48747" key="qhriodei=ktai" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">θηριο-δεῖκται</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">οἱ</gen>, <sense id="n48747.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">exhibitors of wild beasts</tr_>, <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Antioch.Astr.</author> </bibl> in <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <title_ TEIform="title">Cat.Cod.Astr.</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">7.118</biblScope></bibl>, <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">8(4).212</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
